pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Maven compiler configuration from Java 11 to Java 17 using the release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code uses Java 17 features (e.g., text blocks, sealed classes, or pattern matching) that do not compile on Java 11; conversely, the target JDK is 17, so source/target 11 is incorrect for the environment.
Quarkus 2.x requires Java 11+ (specifically 17 for this project) and has removed APIs present in 1.x; running 1.x code on 2.x runtime or vice versa causes ClassNotFound or NoSuchMethod errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Quarkus BOM group ID and artifact ID to match the new platform structure in Quarkus 2.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old BOM coordinates (io.quarkus:quarkus-universe-bom) do not exist in Quarkus 2.x; Maven fails to resolve dependencies without the new coordinates.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 and Quarkus 2.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Surefire 2.22.1 has known issues with Java 17 module system and reflection; tests may fail to launch or discover classes without a newer version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly add quarkus-arc dependency which is required for CDI functionality in newer Quarkus versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x may not transitively include arc in all contexts or requires explicit declaration for certain extensions; missing dependency causes ClassNotFoundException for CDI annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Quarkus Maven plugin configuration to use platform properties and enable extensions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x requires the plugin to be managed by the platform BOM and often requires <extensions>true</extensions> for proper lifecycle integration; otherwise, build goals may not execute correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Move -parameters compiler argument from property to plugin configuration for explicitness.
Disable module path usage for Failsafe plugin to avoid Java 17 module system issues during integration tests.
Pass maven.home system property to tests to ensure correct environment resolution.
Ensure JBoss LogManager is used in native image tests.
Update Maven POM XSD schema location from http to https.
Rename the project artifact ID to reflect its purpose as a demo.
Update project version format to include minor version.
Add generate-code and generate-code-tests goals to Quarkus plugin execution.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Add exclusion pattern for Quarkus native application directory to prevent it from being included in the Docker build context.

.github/workflows/mvn-build.yml.general_idea: Pin the GitHub Action to a specific commit SHA for security and reproducibility.
Update the java-version input format to match the action's expected syntax.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from an OpenJDK 8 Alpine variant to a Red Hat UBI8 OpenJDK 11 image to align with the Java 17 migration path and modern container standards.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.why_exists: The old image uses OpenJDK 8 which is incompatible with bytecode compiled for Java 17; the application will fail to start with a NoSuchMethodError or UnsupportedClassVersionError.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Update COPY instructions to match the new Quarkus native/JVM build output structure (quarkus-app directory) instead of the legacy flat target directory.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.why_exists: The new Quarkus version changes the build output directory structure; using old paths results in missing files in the container, causing the application to fail to start.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.after:
COPY --chown=185 target/quarkus-app/lib/ /deployments/lib/
COPY --chown=185 target/quarkus-app/*.jar /deployments/
COPY --chown=185 target/quarkus-app/app/ /deployments/app/
COPY --chown=185 target/quarkus-app/quarkus/ /deployments/quarkus/

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Change the entrypoint mechanism from a direct script call to environment variable configuration for the new base image's run-java.sh wrapper.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.why_exists: The new base image expects the application jar to be specified via JAVA_APP_JAR or similar env vars for its internal entrypoint script; the old explicit ENTRYPOINT is removed or incompatible with the new image's user/permission model.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Set UTF-8 locale environment variables to ensure consistent character encoding in the new UBI8 container.
Explicitly expose port 8080 in the Dockerfile for documentation and container orchestration clarity.
Run the application as a non-root user (UID 185) for improved security compliance.
Update the Jolokia agent configuration variable name to match the new base image's expectations.
Rename the environment variable for JVM options from JAVA_OPTIONS to JAVA_OPTS to align with the new base image's run-java.sh script.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.why_exists: The new base image's entrypoint script reads JAVA_OPTS, not JAVA_OPTIONS; without this change, the required Quarkus system properties are not passed to the JVM, potentially causing startup failures or misconfiguration.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Pin the UBI minimal base image to a specific minor version (8.5) for build reproducibility.
Update the documentation comment to use the Maven wrapper and remove the deprecated docker-build flag.
Replace insecure chmod 775 with specific ownership and permission settings for the working directory.
Ensure the copied application binary is owned by the non-root user to avoid permission issues at runtime.
Add a USER instruction to run the container process as a non-root user for security compliance.

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the application version in the HTML title from SNAPSHOT to a specific release candidate format.
Replace basic default styles with a modern CSS framework-like appearance including Roboto font, grid layout, and specific color schemes.
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.before: h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; }
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.after: body { margin: 0; font-family: Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif; } ... .grid { display: grid; ... }

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Expand the HTML content significantly, likely adding documentation or landing page details associated with the Quarkus upgrade.
Update the displayed Quarkus version string in the welcome page to match the new framework version.
Update the displayed application version string in the welcome page.
Completely redesign the HTML structure and CSS of the default welcome page to align with newer Quarkus branding and UI standards.
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.before:
Your new Cloud-Native application is ready!

Congratulations, you have created a new Quarkus application.
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.after:
<div class="header-wrapper">
            <div class="grid">
                <div class="header">
                    <svg id="quarkus-logo-svg" data-name="Quarkus Logo" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1280 195">

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the text content and links in the welcome page to reflect current Quarkus documentation and features (e.g., Dev UI).
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.before:
Why do you see this?

This page is served by Quarkus. The source is in src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/index.html.

What can I do from here?

If not already done, run the application in dev mode using: mvn compile quarkus:dev.
src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.after:
You just made a Quarkus application.

This page is served by Quarkus.

Visit the Dev UI

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Correct the greeting value from lowercase 'hola' to capitalized 'Hola'.
